--name.description: load name to distinguish between several load processes

--hops.description: comma-separated list of node ids making up packet route

--rope.description: use ropes for payload instead of protobuf

closepeersocket.description: Close peer socket on existing session

slowpoke.name: slowpoke
slowpoke.description: Make actor system work a bit worse

--pool-id.description: pool id to spawn actors within

invoke.name: invoke
invoke.description: Query or update blob storage configuration

run.name: run
run.description: Legacy command to start YDB server
